# MuleSoft Documentation

> Mirrored from https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt - Updated on demand
> LLM-friendly index of all MuleSoft product documentation.

## Guides
- [A2A Connector](products/a2a-connector/llms-full.txt): Facilitates inter-agent communication for LLM agents and other applications by implementing the A2A protocol.
- [Accelerators](products/accelerators-home/llms-full.txt): Accelerators are a collection of technical assets (predominantly API specifications and implementation templates), reference architectures, and documentation that can be used to accelerate the implementation of multiple use cases supporting a larger business or industry problem.
- [Access Management](products/access-management/llms-full.txt): Manages users, teams, roles, permissions, environments, business groups, identity providers, and Salesforce org connections.
- [Adobe Marketo Connector](products/marketo-connector/llms-full.txt): A closed-source connector that provides a connection between the Mule runtime engine (Mule) and Adobe Marketo REST APIs.
- [Agent Visualizer](products/agent-visualizer/llms-full.txt): Provides visual monitoring and insights for agent networks, showing real-timegraphs of agents, MCP servers, and LLMs with search and filtering
- [Agentforce Connector](products/agentforce-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to design, build, and manage AI agents within Anypoint Platform.
- [Aggregators Module](products/aggregators-module/llms-full.txt): Contains different types of aggregators capable of storing values and releasing them all together based on the configuration specified.
- [Amazon Bedrock Connector](products/amazon-bedrock-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides the ability to connect to all supported LLMs through an unification layer
- [Amazon DynamoDB Connector](products/amazon-dynamodb-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides connectivity to the Amazon DynamoDB API.
- [Amazon EC2 Connector](products/amazon-ec2-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides connectivity to the Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) API, enabling you to interface with Amazon EC2 to launch as many or as few virtual servers as you need, configure security and networking, and manage storage.
- [Amazon Kinesis Connector](products/amazon-kinesis-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides access to standard Amazon Kinesis Data Stream operations using Anypoint Platform.
- [Amazon Lambda Connector](products/amazon-lambda-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides access to standard Amazon Lambda operations using Anypoint Platform.
- [Amazon RDS Connector](products/amazon-rds-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides connectivity to the Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS) API.
- [Amazon Redshift Connector](products/amazon-redshift-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables synchronization of data and automates business processes between Amazon Redshift and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [Amazon S3 Connector](products/amazon-s3-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides connectivity to the Amazon S3 API, enabling you to interface with Amazon S3 to store objects, download and use data with other AWS services, and build applications that require internet storage.
- [Amazon Secrets Manager Properties Provider](products/amazon-secrets-manager-properties-provider-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to retrieve your secrets from AWS Secrets Manager.
- [Amazon SNS Connector](products/amazon-sns-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides connectivity to the Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) API, enabling you to build distributed web-enabled applications.
- [Amazon SQS Connector](products/amazon-sqs-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides an easy way to interface with the Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) API, enabling Mule users to manage SQS queueing services without having to interact with the API directly.
- [AMQP Connector](products/amqp-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables your application to publish and consume messages using an AMQP 0.9.1-compliant broker.
- [Anypoint CLI](products/anypoint-cli/llms-full.txt): Anypoint Platform CLI provides scripting and command-line capabilities for Anypoint Platform and Anypoint Platform Private Cloud Edition (PCE).
- [Anypoint Code Builder](products/anypoint-code-builder/llms-full.txt): Use the Anypoint Code Builder integrated development environment (IDE) for your API designs, implementations, and integration development.
- [Anypoint Custom Metrics Connector](products/custom-metrics-connector/llms-full.txt): Anypoint Custom Metrics Connector enables you to send operational and business metric values that you define from an application to Anypoint Monitoring, where the metrics can be visualized in real time using custom dashboards.
- [Anypoint MQ Connector](products/anypoint-mq-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides publish-subscribe messaging to Mule apps using the Anypoint MQ cloud service.
- [Anypoint Platform Private Cloud Edition](products/private-cloud/llms-full.txt): Run and manage Mule apps on your local servers following your security policies by using Anypoint Platform Private Cloud Edition (Anypoint Platform PCE).
- [Apache Cassandra Connector](products/cassandra-connector/llms-full.txt): Creates connectivity between Appache Cassandra databases and third-party applications, systems, services such as SAP, PeopleSoft, or Workday, as well as other databases across the enterprise.
- [Apache Kafka Connector](products/kafka-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to interact with the Apache Kafka messaging system and achieve seamless integration between your Mule app and a Kafka cluster, using Mule runtime engine (Mule).
- [API Community Manager](products/api-community-manager/llms-full.txt): With Anypoint API Community Manager, you can build and operate communities around your APIs for developers and partners, both inside and outside of your organization, who write applications that use your APIs.
- [API Experience Hub](products/api-experience-hub/llms-full.txt): API Experience Hub provides a unified portal for discovering and consuming APIs and AI agents.
- [API Functional Monitoring](products/api-functional-monitoring/llms-full.txt): API Functional Monitoring is a component of Anypoint Platform that enables you to ensure the quality and reliability of public and private APIs that are being used in application networks.
- [API Governance](products/api-governance/llms-full.txt): Anypoint API Governance is a component of Anypoint Platform that enables you to apply governance rules to your APIs as part of the API lifecycle.
- [API Manager](products/api-manager/llms-full.txt): Anypoint API Manager (API Manager) is a component of Anypoint Platform that enables you to manage, govern, and secure APIs and server instances.
- [APIkit](products/apikit/llms-full.txt): APIkit scaffolds Mule applications from AsyncAPI, gRPC, GraphQL, OData, RAML, OpenAPI Specification (OAS), and SOAP contracts, validates inbound traffic against those contracts, and can generate MUnit test suites.
- [AS2 Connector](products/as2-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables trading partners to transmit and receive AS2 messages with EDI-X12, EDIFACT, XML, or binary payloads.
- [Asana Connector](products/asana-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables synchronization of data and automates business processes between Asana and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [Azure Cosmos DB Connector](products/azure-cosmos-db-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Azure Cosmos DB API.
- [Azure Data Lake Storage Connector](products/azure-data-lake-storage-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables integration with Azure Data Lake using its Gen2 REST API.
- [Azure Event Hubs Connector](products/azure-event-hubs-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Azure Event Hubs.
- [Azure Key Vault Connector](products/azure-key-vault-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Azure Key Vault API.
- [Azure Key Vault Properties Provider](products/azure-key-vault-properties-provider-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Azure Key Vault API.
- [Azure Service Bus Connector](products/microsoft-azure-sb-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables message integration with Azure Service Bus on the cloud.
- [Azure Service Bus Management Connector](products/azure-service-bus-management-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Amazon Azure service bus.
- [Blackboard Connector](products/blackboard-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Blackboard API.
- [Box Connector](products/box-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides access to the Box Content API for secure content management and content experience features for use in your own app.
- [Canvas Connector](products/canvas-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Canvas API.
- [CAQH Connector](products/caqh-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides access to a nonprofit that collects, stores, monitors, and validates healthcare providersâ€™ information.
- [Cloud Information Model](products/accelerators-cim/llms-full.txt): The Cloud Information Model (CIM) for MuleSoft Accelerators is an application-agnostic data model that simplifies integration and accelerates innovation.
- [CloudHub](products/cloudhub/llms-full.txt): CloudHub is an integration platform as a service (iPaaS) where you can deploy sophisticated cross-cloud integration applications in the cloud, create new APIs on top of existing data sources, integrate on-premises applications with cloud services, and much more.
- [CloudHub 2.0](products/cloudhub-2/llms-full.txt): CloudHub 2.0 is a fully managed, containerized integration platform as a service (iPaaS) where you can deploy APIs and integrations as lightweight containers in the cloud.
- [CloudHub Connector](products/cloudhub-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the CloudHub API from your Mule application.
- [Coda Connector](products/coda-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Coda API.
- [Composer](products/composer/llms-full.txt): MuleSoft Composer (Composer) automates data integration between systems using a no-code, visual interface.
- [Composer for Salesforce](products/composer-salesforce/llms-full.txt): MuleSoft Composer for Salesforce (Composer) automates data integration between systems using a no-code interface within your Salesforce org.
- [Compression Module](products/compression-module/llms-full.txt): Supports and provides access to the most-used file archiver and compression formats through a Mule app.
- [Confluent Schema Registry Connector](products/confluent-schema-registry-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Confluent Schema Registry platform.
- [Connector Builder](products/connector-builder/llms-full.txt): Use Connector Builder to create your own connectors easily.
- [Connectors](products/connectors/llms-full.txt): Anypoint Connectors are reusable extensions to Mule runtime engine (Mule) that enable you to integrate your apps with third-party APIs, databases, and standard integration protocols without writing complex code.
- [Consumer Goods](products/consumer-goods/llms-full.txt): MuleSoft Accelerator for Consumer Goods helps consumer goods companies integrate their digital operations to gain visibility into trade promotion management and retail execution.
- [Cryptography Module](products/cryptography-module/llms-full.txt): Cryptography module provides cryptography capabilities to a Mule application.
- [D2L Brightspace Connector](products/d2l-brightspace-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the D2L Brightspace API.
- [Database Connector](products/db-connector/llms-full.txt): Can connect to almost any Java Database Connectivity (JDBC) relational database and run SQL operations.
- [DataGraph](products/datagraph/llms-full.txt): Anypoint DataGraph enables you to unify all the data within your application network in a unified schema.
- [DataWeave](products/dataweave/llms-full.txt): This MuleSoft programming language simplifies data transformation tasks and serves as Mule runtimeâ€™s expression language for configuring components and connectors.
- [Design Center](products/design-center/llms-full.txt): Anypoint Design Center is a development environment that includes API Designer, a tool that enables you to create API specifications in several modeling languages and create RAML API fragments.
- [DHL Tracking Connector](products/dhl-tracking-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the DHL Tracking API.
- [DocuSign Connector](products/docusign-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the DocuSign platform.
- [Dropbox Connector](products/dropbox-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Dropbox API.
- [EDIFACT EDI Connector](products/edifact-edi-connector/llms-full.txt): Lets you convert EDIFACT messages to and from DataWeave-compatible representations using lists and maps.
- [Einstein AI Connector](products/einstein-ai-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides connectivity to LLMs via the Salesforce Einstein Trust Layer.
- [Email Connector](products/email-connector/llms-full.txt): Sends and retrieves email messages over standard email protocols.
- [EU Control Plane](products/eu-control-plane/llms-full.txt): MuleSoft hosts a version of the Anypoint Platform control plane entirely within the EU (Frankfurt or Dublin data centers).
- [Exchange](products/exchange/llms-full.txt): Anypoint Exchange is a curated catalog of reusable assets.
- [File Connector](products/file-connector/llms-full.txt): Handles files and folders on a locally mounted file system.
- [Financial Services](products/financial-services/llms-full.txt): MuleSoft Accelerator for Financial Services simplifies customer 360 initiatives by unlocking both core banking and insurance platforms, systems of engagement (such as CRM and ITSM), Insuretechs, and FinTech data.
- [FTP Connector](products/ftp-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides access to files and folders on an FTP server.
- [FTPS Connector](products/ftps-connector/llms-full.txt): Connects to FTP servers the same way as the FTP connector but adds support for Transport Layer Security (TLS).
- [Gmail Connector](products/gmail-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Gmail platform.
- [Google BigQuery Connector](products/google-bigquery-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the Google BigQuery service.
- [Google Calendar Connector](products/google-calendar-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the Google Calendar service.
- [Google Drive Connector](products/google-drive-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the Google Drive service.
- [Google Gemini Connector](products/google-gemini-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Google Gemini API.
- [Google Pub/Sub Connector](products/google-pubsub-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the Google Pub/Sub service.
- [Google Sheets Connector](products/google-sheets-connector/llms-full.txt): Synchronizes data and automates business processes between Google Sheets and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [Government Cloud](products/gov-cloud/llms-full.txt): MuleSoft Government Cloud is a secure, Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP)-moderate certified deployment environment that enables government agencies to use Anypoint Platform in the cloud.
- [gRPC Connector](products/grpc-connector/llms-full.txt): Enable high-performance integration with gRPC services using protocol buffers for efficient, type-safe communication.
- [Hadoop (HDFS) Connector](products/hdfs-connector/llms-full.txt): Works as a bidirectional gateway between Mule applications and Apache Hadoop Distributed File System (HDFS).
- [Healthcare](products/healthcare/llms-full.txt): The MuleSoft Accelerator for Healthcare equips Payer, Provider, and Life Sciences organizations with foundational assets to accelerate their digital transformation journey.
- [HL7 EDI Connector](products/hl7-connector/llms-full.txt): This connector enables you to convert HL7 ER7 messages to and from DataWeave-compatible representations using lists and maps.
- [HL7 MLLP Connector](products/hl7-mllp-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides connectivity and parsing functionality for HL7 MLLP messages.
- [Home](products/general/llms-full.txt): Get started with a tutorial for building your first API, resource pages with links to other guides and websites, and a glossary.
- [Hosting Options](products/hosting-home/llms-full.txt): Host the Anypoint Platform control plane and runtime plane in different locations to meet your security, data privacy, and compliance requirements.
- [HTTP Connector](products/http-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to declare HTTP servers that listen to requests and trigger flows, as well as HTTP clients that can communicate with any HTTP service.
- [Hybrid Standalone](products/hybrid-standalone/llms-full.txt): Hybrid standalone instances enable you to host the Mule runtime engine (Mule) in an environment you control.
- [Hyperforce](products/hyperforce/llms-full.txt): Salesforce Hyperforce (Hyperforce) provides a modern infrastructure that lets you deploy MuleSoft applications globally with control over data residency and compliance.
- [IBM CTG Connector](products/ibm-ctg-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides integration with back-end CICS apps using the CICS Transaction Gateway.
- [IBM MQ Connector](products/ibm-mq-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables an app to do messaging to a IBM MQ Broker using the IBM MQ JMS implementation.
- [IDP](products/idp/llms-full.txt): MuleSoft Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) enables you to read invoices, purchase orders, and other unstructured or semi-structured documents and then analyze and refine the extracted content using AI capabilities to create a structured response.
- [Informatica Business 360 Connector](products/informatica-b360-connector/llms-full.txt): Integrate with the Informatica Business 360 (MDM) REST API for master data management, including entity CRUD, search, fuzzy matching, and metadata discovery.
- [Intercom Connector](products/intercom-connector/llms-full.txt): Synchronizes data and automates business processes between Google Sheets and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [Java Module](products/java-module/llms-full.txt): Used to invoke Java code.
- [Jira Connector](products/jira-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables synchronization of data and automation of business processes between Jira and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [JMS Connector](products/jms-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables your app to do messaging using the JMS implementation of your choice.
- [JSON Module](products/json-module/llms-full.txt): Provides extra functionality for processing JSON documents.
- [Kerberos Module](products/kerberos-module/llms-full.txt): Kerberos Module adds Kerberos (SPNEGO) proxy authentication support for the Mule HTTP Connector.
- [LDAP Connector](products/ldap-connector/llms-full.txt): A public standard that facilitates maintenance and access to distributed directories (such as network user privilege information) over an Internet Protocol (IP) network.
- [Life Sciences](products/life-sciences/llms-full.txt): The MuleSoft Accelerator for Life Sciences helps pharmaceuticals, medical device companies, and contract research organizations (CROs) seamlessly integrate their digital operations and get their products to market faster.
- [Mailchimp Marketing Connector](products/mailchimp-marketing-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect Mule flows to the Mailchimp Marketing API.
- [Manufacturing](products/manufacturing/llms-full.txt): MuleSoft Accelerator for Manufacturing equips discrete and process manufacturers with foundational assets for common use cases to accelerate their digital transformation journey.
- [MCP Connector](products/mcp-connector/llms-full.txt): Uses the MCP protocol to enable supported agents to invoke and communicate with APIs and other artifacts built on Anypoint Platform.
- [Microsoft .NET Connector](products/microsoft-dotnet-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to execute native .NET code in a Mule application.
- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Connector](products/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central API.
- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Connector](products/microsoft-dynamics-365-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables integration with the Microsoft Dynamics 365 Cloud API.
- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 For Finance and Operations Connector](products/microsoft-365-ops-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables integration with Microsoft Dynamics 365 for Finance and Operations Web API.
- [Microsoft Dynamics AX 2012 Connector](products/microsoft-dynamics-ax-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables Mule apps to interact with the Microsoft Dynamics AX Query Service.
- [Microsoft Dynamics CRM Connector](products/microsoft-dynamics-crm-connector/llms-full.txt): Allows Mule appns to interact with Microsoft Dynamics CRM's SOAP Organization Service.
- [Microsoft Dynamics GP Connector](products/microsoft-dynamics-gp-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables Mule applications to interact with the Microsoft Dynamics Great Plains (GP) Web Services.
- [Microsoft Dynamics NAV Connector](products/microsoft-dynamics-nav-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables Mule apps to interact with Microsoft Dynamics NAV Web Services.
- [Microsoft Excel Online Connector](products/microsoft-excel-online-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the Excel Online platform.
- [Microsoft MSMQ Connector](products/msmq-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides connectivity to proprietary functionality on the Windows platform.
- [Microsoft OneDrive Connector](products/microsoft-onedrive-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the most commonly used operations provided by the Microsoft Graph APIs.
- [Microsoft Outlook 365 Connector](products/microsoft-outlook-365-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the most commonly used operations provided by Microsoft Outlook 365.
- [Microsoft Power BI Connector](products/microsoft-power-bi-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the most commonly used operations provided by the Microsoft Power BI APIs.
- [Microsoft Service Bus Connector](products/microsoft-service-bus-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables message integration with Windows Service Bus on-premises.
- [Microsoft SharePoint Connector](products/sharepoint-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to manage content and document management, to access  intranet and extranet portals and websites, to collaborate with, and to search your entire enterprise.
- [Microsoft Teams Connector](products/microsoft-teams-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the most commonly used operations provided by the Microsoft Teams APIs.
- [Microsoft Windows PowerShell Connector](products/windows-powershell-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables Windows OS administration tasks to be integrated into Mule applications.
- [MongoDB Connector](products/mongodb-connector/llms-full.txt): A closed-source connector that provides a connection between the Mule runtime and third-party software on a MongoDB server.
- [Monitoring](products/monitoring/llms-full.txt): Anypoint Monitoring provides tools to aggregate and map metrics across dependent systems in real-time, configure dashboards and alerts to reduce the mean time to identification of issues (MTTI), and store and search log data at scale.
- [Moodle Connector](products/moodle-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Moodle API.
- [MQ](products/mq/llms-full.txt): Anypoint MQ is a multi-tenant, cloud-based message queuing service for exchanging data asynchronously between your applications.
- [MQTT Connector](products/mqtt3-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables your application to publish and consume messages using an MQTT version 3.x compliant broker.
- [Mule Gateway](products/mule-gateway/llms-full.txt): An API gateway allows you to add a dedicated orchestration layer on top of your backend APIs and services to help you separate orchestration from implementation concerns.
- [Mule Runtime](products/mule-runtime/llms-full.txt): Mule runtime engine (Mule) is a lightweight integration engine that runs Mule applications and supports domains and policies.
- [Mule SDK](products/mule-sdk/llms-full.txt): Use the Mule SDK for Java or XML to extend the Mule 4 Runtime by creating new modules that you can install in Mule apps.
- [MuleSoft AI Chain Connector](products/mulesoft-ai-chain-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to design, build, and manage AI agents within Anypoint Platform
- [MuleSoft Inference Connector](products/mulesoft-inference-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to integrate with multiple AI inference providers and large language models within Anypoint Platform
- [MuleSoft MCP Servers](products/mulesoft-mcp-server/llms-full.txt): MuleSoft MCP Servers implement the Model Context Protocol (MCP) so AI assistants in your IDE can work with MuleSoft products and services.
- [MuleSoft Terraform Provider](products/mulesoft-terraform-provider/llms-full.txt): The MuleSoft Terraform provider enables you to manage MuleSoft resources using Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
- [MuleSoft Vectors Connector](products/mulesoft-vectors-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to integrate AI into your data for smarter search and RAG
- [MUnit](products/munit/llms-full.txt): Build automated tests for your integrations and APIs with MUnit.
- [Neo4j Connector](products/neo4j-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides the capability to execute CQL statements and run basic operations, such as create, update, delete, and select nodes against a Neo4j Graph database instance.
- [NetSuite Connector](products/netsuite-connector/llms-full.txt): Synchronizes data and automates business processes between NetSuite and third party applications, either on-premise or in the cloud.
- [NetSuite OpenAir Connector](products/netsuite-openair-connector/llms-full.txt): A closed-source enterprise connector that provides a connection between OpenAir and third-party software.
- [NetSuite Restlet Connector](products/netsuite-restlet-connector/llms-full.txt): Synchronizes data and automates business processes between NetSuite and third party applications, either on-premise or in the cloud.
- [Notion Connector](products/notion-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Notion API.
- [OAuth Module](products/oauth-module/llms-full.txt): An extension to hook OAuth2 to HTTP extension connectors.
- [OAuth2 Provider Module](products/oauth2-provider-module/llms-full.txt): Allows a Mule runtime engine (Mule) app to be configured as an Authentication Manager in an OAuth2 dance.
- [Object Store](products/object-store/llms-full.txt): Object Store v2 lets CloudHub applications store data and states across batch processes, Mule components and applications, from within an application or by using the Object Store REST API.
- [Object Store Connector](products/object-store-connector/llms-full.txt): A Mule component that allows for simple key-value storage.
- [Omni Gateway](products/gateway/llms-full.txt): Omni Gateway (formally Flex Gateway) is an Envoy-based, ultrafast lightweight API gateway designed to manage and secure APIs running anywhere.
- [Omni Gateway Policy Development Kit (PDK)](products/pdk/llms-full.txt): Omni Gateway Policy Development Kit (PDK) is a software development kit that enables you to develop custom policies to help manage security, control traffic, and improve API adoption.
- [OpenAI Connector](products/openai-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the OpenAI API.
- [OpenWeatherMap Connector](products/openweathermap-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the OpenWeatherMap API.
- [Oracle EBS 12.1 Connector](products/oracle-ebs-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides real-time connectivity to query and update Oracle EBS using web services and message queues.
- [Oracle EBS 12.2 Connector](products/oracle-ebs-122-connector/llms-full.txt): Facilitates connections between Mule runtime engine (Mule) integration and Oracle E-Business Suite 12.2 applications.
- [Oracle PeopleSoft Connector](products/peoplesoft-connector/llms-full.txt): A closed-source connector that uses the Component Interface (CI) to communicate in real-time with the service.
- [Oracle Siebel Connector](products/siebel-connector/llms-full.txt): Lets you access connections between Mule runtime engine (Mule) integration apps and the Oracle Siebel customer relationship manager (CRM).
- [PagerDuty Connector](products/pagerduty-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the PagerDuty API.
- [Partner Manager](products/partner-manager/llms-full.txt): Perform bidirectional Business-to-Business (B2B) message exchanges with your external business partner ecosystem.
- [QuickBooks Online Connector](products/quickbooks-online-connector/llms-full.txt): Anypoint Connector for QuickBooks Online (QuickBooks Online Connector) synchronizes data and automates business processes between QuickBooks Online and third-party applications, either on-premises or in the cloud.
- [Redis Connector](products/redis-connector/llms-full.txt): An open source, in-memory data structure store that is used for use cases such as caching a user profile, creating a leader board, tracking real time activities on a website, implementing a spam filtering system, using it as a message queue, use as a custom object store, and more.
- [Release Notes](products/release-notes/llms-full.txt): Release notes for all versions of MuleSoft products, including new features, fixes, and known issues.
- [Retail](products/retail/llms-full.txt): MuleSoft Accelerator for Retail empowers retail IT teams to unlock data from systems including ERP, CRM, MDM, commerce, and marketing to activate digital projects faster.
- [Roostify Connector](products/roostify-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables customers to convert completed loan applications to an optimized and intuitive digital user experience, tailored to each DBA, branch, or channel.
- [RosettaNet Connector](products/rosettanet-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides B2B functionality using the RosettaNet Information Framework (RNIF) for information exchange of Rosetta Partner Interface Process (PIP) messages.
- [RPA](products/rpa-home/llms-full.txt): MuleSoft Robotic Process Automation (RPA) enables you to automate business processes and tasks by using bots, which helps save time and prevent introducing human errors.
- [RPA Bot](products/rpa-bot/llms-full.txt): RPA Bots are software robots that carry out any RPA processes assigned to them.
- [RPA Builder](products/rpa-builder/llms-full.txt): RPA Builder is the on-premise development environment that enables you to build the automations by specifying the tasks and steps of the process.
- [RPA Manager](products/rpa-manager/llms-full.txt): RPA Manager is the cloud-based control plane for the automations that is integrated into Anypoint Platform.
- [RPA Recorder](products/rpa-recorder/llms-full.txt): Use RPA Recorder to record business processes.
- [Runtime Fabric](products/runtime-fabric/llms-full.txt): Anypoint Runtime Fabric enables you to deploy Mule applications and API proxies to a Kubernetes cluster that you create, configure, and manage.
- [Runtime Manager](products/runtime-manager/llms-full.txt): Anypoint Runtime Manager is the interface to Anypoint Platform that provides a unified view of your applications, servers, and APIs.
- [Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Data Connector](products/commerce-cloud-b2c-data-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Salesforce Commerce Cloud Data API and access the data, update the data, and delete the data, as required.
- [Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Shop API Connector](products/commerce-cloud-shop-api-connector/llms-full.txt): This connector enables a client to interact with the system as a shop customer or as an agent shopping on behalf of a customer.
- [Salesforce Composite Connector](products/salesforce-composite-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to work with the Salesforce Batch and SObject Tree APIs.
- [Salesforce Connector](products/salesforce-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Salesforce SOAP API, REST API, Bulk API, and Streaming API, depending on the operation you configure.
- [Salesforce Data Cloud Connector](products/salesforce-data-cloud-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Salesforce Data Cloud API.
- [Salesforce Einstein Analytics Connector](products/salesforce-analytics-cloud-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Salesforce Analytics Cloud application using the Salesforce External Data API.
- [Salesforce Marketing Cloud Connector](products/salesforce-marketing-cloud-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Marketing Cloud API web services (now known as the Marketing Cloud API), which is also known as the Salesforce Marketing Cloud.
- [Salesforce Marketing Cloud REST Connector](products/salesforce-marketing-cloud-rest-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the Salesforce Marketing Cloud REST API.
- [Salesforce OMS](products/salesforce-oms/llms-full.txt): The MuleSoft Accelerator for Salesforce OMS enables you to integrate your Order Management System (OMS) with external business partners and application ecosystems by leveraging the application and Business-to-Business (B2B) integration capabilities of Anypoint Platform.
- [Salesforce Pub/Sub Connector](products/salesforce-pubsub-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the Salesforce Pub/Sub API.
- [SAP Concur Connector](products/sap-concur-connector/llms-full.txt): A SaaS provider from SAP for integrated travel and expense management solutions.
- [SAP Connector](products/sap-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables the integration of data to and from external systems based on SAP NetWeaver.
- [SAP S/4HANA OData Connector](products/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides full support for the query, get, create, update, delete entities, execute functions, and execute batch requests using the OData API exposed by SAP S/4HANA.
- [SAP S/4HANA SOAP Connector](products/sap-s4hana-soap-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides full support for the SOAP APIs exposed by S/4HANA Cloud ERP.
- [SAP SuccessFactors Connector](products/sap-successfactors-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides full support to query, create, update, and delete entities using the ODATA API exposed by SuccessFactors.
- [Scripting Module](products/scripting-module/llms-full.txt): Executes custom logic written in a scripting language.
- [Security](products/anypoint-security/llms-full.txt): Anypoint Security for Anypoint Runtime Fabric provides a layered approach to secure your application network.
- [ServiceNow Connector](products/servicenow-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides connections between Mule runtime engine (Mule) and ServiceNow apps.
- [SFTP Connector](products/sftp-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides access to files and folders on a SFTP server.
- [Shippo Connector](products/shippo-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Shippo API.
- [ShipStation Connector](products/shipstation-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the ShipStation API.
- [Shopify Connector](products/shopify-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Shopify REST Admin API.
- [Slack Connector](products/slack-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the Slack platform.
- [Smartsheet Connector](products/smartsheet-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to programmatically access and manage your organization's Smartsheet data and account information
- [Snowflake Connector](products/snowflake-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect with your Snowflake instance to load data, run queries in Snowflake tables, and sync data with external business applications.
- [Sockets Connector](products/sockets-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides a sockets listener, send capability, and send and receive functionality.
- [Spring Module](products/spring-module/llms-full.txt): Enables Mule apps to use the Spring framework.
- [Stripe Connector](products/stripe-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the Stripe platform.
- [Studio](products/studio/llms-full.txt): Anypoint Studio is MuleSoftâ€™s Eclipse-based integration development environment for designing and testing Mule applications.
- [Tableau Connector](products/tableau-specialist-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect Mule flows to the Tableau API.
- [Teamwork Connector](products/teamwork-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Teamwork API.
- [Tracing Module](products/tracing-module/llms-full.txt): Provides tracing capabilities by managing logging variables and also enables you to modify the correlation ID during the execution of a flow.
- [TRADACOMS EDI Connector](products/tradacoms-edi-connector/llms-full.txt): Lets you convert TRADACOMS transmissions to and from DataWeave-compatible representations using lists and maps.
- [Trello Connector](products/trello-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to integrate custom applications into Trello to facilitate faster collaboration between teams
- [Twilio Connector](products/twilio-connector/llms-full.txt): A cloud communications infrastructure as a service (IaaS).
- [Validation Module](products/validation-connector/llms-full.txt): Can verify that the contents of a message in a Mule flow match specific criteria.
- [Veeva Vault Connector](products/veevavault-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect Mule flows to the Veeva Vault platform using the Veeva Vault REST API.
- [Visualizer](products/visualizer/llms-full.txt): API Visualizer (formerly Anypoint Visualizer) gives you a real-time, graphical view of your entire application network, including APIs, Mule applications, and the third-party systems they invoke.
- [VM Connector](products/vm-connector/llms-full.txt): Handles intra-app and inter-app communication through asynchronous queues that can be transient or persistent.
- [Web Service Consumer Connector](products/web-service-consumer-connector/llms-full.txt): Consumes a SOAP Web service to acquire data from an external source.
- [WebSockets Connector](products/websockets-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides communication through the WebSockets protocol, allowing external systems to open connections to the server (inbound sockets) or to establish connections to external systems (outbound socket).
- [Workable Connector](products/workable-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect to the Workable API.
- [Workday Connector](products/workday-connector/llms-full.txt): Provides access to standard Workday operations.
- [WSS Module](products/wss-module/llms-full.txt): Can process and validate an inbound SOAP request and sign outbound SOAP responses using Web Service Security (WSS).
- [X12 EDI Connector](products/x12-edi-connector/llms-full.txt): Lets you convert X12 messages to and from DataWeave-compatible representations using lists and maps.
- [Xero Accounting Connector](products/xero-accounting-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to access the Xero Accounting APIs.
- [XML Module](products/xml-module/llms-full.txt): Can process and extract data from an XML document.
- [Zendesk Connector](products/zendesk-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect Mule flows to the Zendesk platform using the Zendesk REST Support API.
- [Zoom Connector](products/zoom-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables you to connect Mule flows to the Zoom API.
- [Zuora AQuA Connector](products/zuora-aqua-connector/llms-full.txt): A smart connector that is generated using REST Connect 2.0.
- [Zuora Connector](products/zuora-connector/llms-full.txt): Enables access to the Zuora platform.
